name: @caelaxie/inoreader-mcp
description: Remote Cloudflare MCP server for Inoreader.

scripts.release:check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build && pnpm pack --dry-run
scripts.release:major: pnpm release:check && pnpm version major && pnpm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:minor: pnpm release:check && pnpm version minor && pnpm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
scripts.release:patch: pnpm release:check && pnpm version patch && pnpm publish --access public && git push --follow-tags
